meta.description: Project knowledge graph. Read this first, follow edges to content files.

nodes.desc: Project-level instructions for Claude Code. Points to README.md for details.
Comprehensive project documentation: installation, usage, architecture, and file structure for the chomp/bite Claude Code skills.
Design fiction showing chomp/bite workflows through a narrative scenario. Defines the conceptual model: chomp is the meal, bite is what you cook next.
Skill definition for /chomp-init: creates project directories, installs /chomp and /bite as project-level skills, updates CLAUDE.md and .gitignore.
Bash script that clones a git repo (or reads local) and dumps all source files into a single markdown file with filetree and fenced code blocks.
Python persistent REPL for RLM workflows. Provides init, exec, status, reset, chunking, grep, and buffer helpers with pickle-based state persistence.
Skill template for /bite: cross-repo research that formulates questions with the user, runs RLM subcalls against chunks, and writes research.md and surface-map.md.
Skill template for /chomp: clones or dumps a repo, loads into RLM, chunks it, and runs a full subcall analysis loop against user questions.
Agent template for the RLM sub-LLM (runs on Haiku). Extracts relevant info from a single chunk given a query and returns structured JSON.
